sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95329" key="sku/mneios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκύμν-ειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n95329.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to whelps</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
